_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Resolve conflicts in laws, regulations, policies, standards, or procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting cross-jurisdictional compliance mapping, identifying conflicts-of-law and overlapping requirements, and developing harmonized compliance approaches that satisfy multiple regulatory regimes simultaneously.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.557), RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.587). Shared vocabulary: [conflicts]. DCWF-only terms [laws, policies, procedures, regulations, resolve, standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, compliance, conducting, cross, developing, harmonized] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.867, R=0.847). P exceeds R by 0.020 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Resolve conflicts in laws, regulations, policies, standards, or procedures." and "Skill in conducting cross-jurisdictional compliance mapping, identifying conflic" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.621 ≈ STS 0.587 (gap 0.034). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [conflicts] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [conflicts]. DCWF-only: [laws, policies, procedures, regulations, resolve, standards]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, compliance, conducting, cross, developing, harmonized].
